subcodes.first_line: O Mulla! Hearken to the Call of the Lord of all beings from the precincts of the Prison. Verily, it draweth thee nigh unto God and purifieth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا اسمع ندآء مولی الوری من شطر السجن انه یقربک الی الله و یطهرک عن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
